scope: causal_summary and description drift from current docs after manual or HVR edits
summary: No persisted proof that a stored summary matches current docs. description and causal_summary use two different extractors so they legitimately diverge from the same doc. A scoped drift gate is missing.

title: Hash-gated re-derive for description.json
problem: generatePerFolderDescription stamps lastUpdated on every run, while the canonical save only regenerates description.json when missing or corrupt and otherwise bumps tracking. That can make a stale description look fresh after an HVR edit.
proposal: Store a deterministic source_hash or derived_from object in description.json. On canonical save and generate-description, re-run generation only when the hash changed. Overlaps with a3-f1, merge.

title: Add source hashes to graph-metadata drift detection
problem: Graph metadata records only doc names in source_docs with no hashes, and deriveCausalSummary derives from spec.md then falls back to frontmatter, so there is no persisted proof that current causal_summary matches current docs.
proposal: Add derived.source_doc_hashes for canonical docs and a drift check that re-derives with volatile fields ignored and compares hashes plus causal_summary. Overlaps with a3-f3.

title: Use one shared synopsis extractor
problem: extractDescription returns the first heading before checking Problem/Purpose/Overview, while extractSummary only recognizes Overview or a broad paragraph regex, so description and causal_summary can diverge from the same doc.
proposal: Create one deterministic derivePacketSynopsis helper with explicit precedence: frontmatter description, Overview, Problem or Purpose, then first meaningful paragraph. Use it for both fields with field-specific length limits.

title: Add a scoped metadata drift gate
problem: memory_save does not refresh packet metadata and only emits an advisory. Existing review flags catch missing or short summaries but not stale summaries, and the per-folder staleness check is mtime-only.
proposal: Add checkGeneratedMetadataDrift(specFolder) used by strict validation and dry-run backfill. Re-derive only the requested folder, compare generated fields ignoring volatile timestamps, report description_drift and causal_summary_drift.
